title: dysoxylum kunthianum
intro: Dysoxylum kunthianum, also known as the 'Kunth's Dysoxylum' or 'Bengal Quinine Tree', is a species of flowering plant in the mahogany family Meliaceae. This tree is traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine, valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antipyretic effects. The health benefits of Dysoxylum kunthianum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various skin conditions, such as wounds and ulcers. The plant's medicinal properties are often extracted and used in herbal preparations, including decoctions, infusions, and ointments, which are used to treat a range of health issues.
